torch_pattern: emb = timestep * time_proj_factor; torch.cat([torch.cos(emb), torch.sin(emb)], dim=-1)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [{BATCH}, 1] timestep scaled by time_proj_factor; small activation (batch_size rows, half_dim cols)
placement_observations.source: call_site: diffusion timestep/guidance embedding — cos and sin sibling branches on emb, concatenated dim=-1 and fed to timestep_embedder; timestep input asserted float32
